CREATE TABLE xml_elements (id INT, element_name VARCHAR(100), element_value VARCHAR(100));
SELECT xte_node(element_name, element_value) FROM xml_elements WHERE id = 1;
SELECT xte_node(element_name, 'Hello') FROM xml_elements WHERE id = 2;
SELECT xte_node(element_name, '<child>Hello</child>') AS child_vector FROM xml_elements WHERE element_name = 'root';
SELECT xte_node(element_name, '2', 'Hello') FROM xml_elements WHERE id IN (SELECT id FROM xml_elements WHERE element_name = 'root');
SELECT id, xte_node(element_name, element_value) AS xml_vector FROM xml_elements WHERE element_value IS NOT NULL;
SELECT xte_node('root', 'child', (SELECT element_value FROM xml_elements WHERE id = 2)) AS nested_vector;
SELECT xte_node('root', NULL) FROM xml_elements WHERE id = 1;
SELECT xte_node('element_name', element_value) FROM xml_elements WHERE id = (SELECT MAX(id) FROM xml_elements);
SELECT xte_node('child', 'Goodbye', ' Earth') AS concatenated_vector FROM xml_elements WHERE element_name = 'child';
SELECT xte_node('invalid_element') FROM xml_elements WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM xml_elements WHERE id = 5);
SELECT xte_node('root', 'value1', 'value2', 'value3') FROM xml_elements WHERE id = 1;
SELECT id, xte_node(element_name) FROM xml_elements LIMIT 10;
